passage: The value of y is 8 more than twice the value of x. Which equation represents y in terms of x?

test_name: October 2024 International Form B SAT Math Module 2
passage: To purchase a used car at a total price of 1l,000 dollars, a onetime down payment isrequired, and then fixed monthly payments are made for the remaining amount owed forthe car. The equation 1l,000=2,200 + 200t represents this situation, where t is thenumber of fixed monthly payments that are made. Which of the following is the bestinterpretation of 200 in this context?

choices.label: A
choices.text: The amount, in dollars, of the down payment

choices.label: B
choices.text: The amount, in dollars, of each fixed monthly payment

choices.label: C
choices.text: The total amount, in dollars, paid for the car after t fixed monthly payments

choices.label: D
choices.text: The total number of fixed monthly payments

How many beach umbrellas did thepark rent on Wednesday?(profit = total revenue - total expenses)
